title: Arlong’s Rule Tightens Around Nami
scene: On pages 17–19, the story moves through Arlong Park and Nami’s dangerous position among the fish-men. Cocoyasi Village and nearby towns show the cost of Arlong’s occupation.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: As expected. You're a reasonable man, arlong.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: I'd say she's turned into a fine woman!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I must... tell Brother Zoro...! That's shes...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hey! Don't get tired now, you hippo!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I think it might have something do with your kicks...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hey! You're swimming the wrong way! Turn to the left!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: We're gonna crash into the shore!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: The spark ignites the gunpowder and the bullet is shot out.

summary: This part builds the Arlong Park conflict by showing how Nami’s choices look contradictory from outside while Arlong’s power keeps the island trapped.
